error.signature: Android resource linking failed. error: resource style/Theme.AppCompat not found

verdict.summary: AAPT2 cannot link a referenced resource. Missing dependency, wrong theme parent, or resource name typo.

dead_ends.why_fails: AAPT2 is mandatory since AGP 3.0+. The flag is ignored in modern versions.

dead_ends.action: Copy missing resource definitions from library source code
dead_ends.why_fails: Library resources should come from the dependency. Duplicating them causes version conflicts.

workarounds.how: implementation 'com.google.android.material:material:1.11.0'  // provides Material themes and styles

workarounds.action: Verify the parent theme exists in your dependencies
workarounds.how: Check styles.xml parent theme; ensure it matches an available theme from your dependencies

workarounds.action: Run AAPT2 with verbose logging to find exact missing resource
workarounds.how: ./gradlew assembleDebug --info 2>&1 | grep 'AAPT'  # shows exact resource and file with the error
